# VS2010 Theme

Visual Studio 2010 inspired styling with gradient backgrounds and classic Windows chrome.

---

## Installation

```bash
dotnet add package Dirkster.AvalonDock.Themes.VS2010
```

## Usage

```csharp
using AvalonDock.Themes;

dockManager.Theme = new VS2010Theme();
```

```xml
<avalonDock:DockingManager.Theme>
    <themes:VS2010Theme />
</avalonDock:DockingManager.Theme>
```
